star_1.text: It had been years since I played this game. Recently redownload and...my God, it's riddled with pay-to-play hurdles, cooldowns and ads. I guess good for them getting a payday but I'll never even glance at one of their products again. And marketing team, please don't respond and ask "how can we make your experience better?" You know the answer.

Update: You can help me out by learning to read. As I already stated... The store says the ads will be removed if you buy. This is not true, as they are still showing after several purchases. For example, they show ads to try and sell their in-game content and coins. I did not pay to just remove third party ads. Ads are ads and you need to give me the ad free experiance I paid for or refund me for not providing what you advertised.

The ads are truly too much. After every level, ads are forced upon me. It's incredibly tedious and takes me out of my enjoyment of the game. I loved this when it first came out. If the abundant ads could be dampened without having to pay, I'd reconsider a download. 0/5 stars. -even after having a reply from the creator, it doesn't change my gaming experience. Free or not, too many ads are a massive problem. I wouldn't want others wasting their time. Very unfortunate.

Remember the good old classic from your childhood? it's about the same. except that now you have pop ups everywhere, begging you to watch ads to speed up your progress. and forced ads after every other game. and other pop ups designed only to annoy you into buying whatever 5€ ad free package. it really fell from grace.

15 years ago this game had no ads and I can just play. now I have to pay $3 to let me play like before? I can't just finish a level and move to the next. I have to no choice but to click "watch ad" real nice. real nice. silly me for downloading again.

From my view, it's basically "buy no ads or suffer." Every time an ad pops up, it won't let you close it after it finishes. You're forced to close the whole game and reopen it just to keep playing. It gets annoying fast!

I love this game, its amazing, but the ads are unbearable, you can't leave the ad, it throws you into the minigame version of the game, but it doesn't ever prompt you with an X button to leave the ad, gotta restart, if it wasn't for that, this would be a 5 star, the game is exactly how I remember, the ads are the issue. if you are not willing to spend 3$ for the 0 ads then dont play this, its not playable.
Back in the day was a good fun game. Now its a non-stop microtransaction sloppy fest that spends more time shoving obtuse ads then the time you actually spend playing.
this game is full of ads. if you finished one game then you must see one ad to continue next run. atp thsi game is just like other money grabbing games
used to be the best mobile game, now cluttered with ads and micro transactions. almost all of the new content is hidden behind paywall. sadly unplayable for me now
ads are horrible, feels like every game comes with an ad right after that is not optional.
fun and simple game but ads have gotten quite aggressive to the point where you can't enjoy it

This was part of my childhood, it was pure joy, now it's full of microtransactions, unskippable ads (including game breaking ads, because they don't have the tiny X at the corner so you have to literally close the app and reopen it every two or three games), and all sorts of things that NOBODY asked for. Honestly, after all those years, it would've been better if the game just wasn't updated at all, instead of this shameful display of greed that takes away all the fun. ZERO stars if I could.

Well, I installed the game again to try it after a few years, and to try and prove the other reviews complaining about the ads wrong. Sadly they're right, the game has now long been dying and declining in player rates, so planting more and more ads in it makes sense to sustain revenue. But what's the point in choosing not to watch an ad for a free boost item if you're gonna be forced to watch a 15/30 second ad anyway?

Great game. I've been playing it since 2013. Now, to the problem - I got a new phone and although my progress is saved, when it logs in to my profile on the new phone, I have nothing whatsoever, it's as if I just started the game. I have the achievements in the profile but not in the game itself. I've bought almost everything the game has to offer, plus many many many hours in improving stats. How do I transfer everything to the new phone?
This game is almost impossible if you dont watch ads to revive y'all are hungry for money subway surfers is better 💔
Not what it used to be. Cash-grab filled with ads.

Ruined It used to be the perfect time killer, but since they pulled all their apps from the store and became a paid service for most of their games Jetpack Joyride turned into their ad filled flagship just trying to get you to buy the subscription and play their other games. I miss the simplicity of just being able to jump right back into a run after ending one. I miss all their apps that used to be free like collasatron and fish out of water. It's just disappointing.

After installing this game after a long time , I think the dev's got greedy and has mandatory put ads every time u start or else pay and before that i tried my best to get my acc back when it was synced it fb but now the damage has already been done so yeah never downloading this game from now this is my last time I will play this i dropped the star rating from 5 to one for the recent experience thank u halfbrick
Full of ads. It used to be a great little game

star_2.text: I gave this game 5 stars in 2014, and i played it once since then and loved it then too. But I just downloaded it again... Im no stranger to ads in games, and I totally get it. But this... this has crossed the line... without question. Unplayable due to the amount of video ads it requires you to watch, without even opting in to get extra stuff. Its sad but i wont play this again. I figure im watching about 1 min of ad for every 1.5 to 2 min playing. I shudder to think what's become of fruit ninja

I, like many people remember just playing Jetpack Joyride in the 2010s. It was a crisp, crunchy game with fun mechanics and great music. Now it's akin to psychological warfare. I shouldn't have to duck and dodge ads like a ninja when all I want is to play some dang jetpack man! What is this, Las Vegas? And to have the audacity to market a "classic" version that has no ads, only for it to be a subscription only service! If you want people to pay for your game, just say so.

This game used to be good a few years ago, but now it's so full of microtransactions and ads that it's hard to squeeze actual gameplay in. Since you asked, Halfbrick, my suggestion for improving the game is to be a little less greedy and stop with thr aggressive marketing and unskippable ads. I'm not sure why you asked for my feedback, because it's clear that all I want is less ads. Either do it or don't, but don't pretend to care by asking for feedback and then doing nothing.

The game used to be one of the best, and pure gameply-wise, it still is. But as of recent the game has been infested with in app purchases and aggressive advertizing. What used to be a video every few games became pop-ups after every game, and what used to be vehicle and character skins along with new jetpacks are now overpowered power-ups and entirely new vehicles.

To say Jetpack Joyride fell from grace is a massive understatement. The game is fun for a few minutes like you remember, but ten years later, the only substantial changes are incessant advertising and money-grubbing crossovers. To afford costumes or jetpacks (whose selection has hardly changed after ten years), you'd have to watch an ad after every game or buy fake currency. At certain points, they force you to either pay to remove ads or punish you with another unyielding ad. Nostalgic? Yes.

I used to love this game, and still do. I don't mind the microtransactions, as they are mostly cosmetic(i.e. wave rider and sleigh of awesome are two gamechanging featur s locked behind a paywall). The one thin I can not stand is the sheer amount of adds. After every other run, you are prompted to watch an ad, or to pay for no adds. This is just disappointing, and also why I play without wifi.

It's fun but it has got some issues. 1st of all it takes me a while to get coins to get stuff. 2nd half of the things there have an overpriced cost. It's fun for offline playing. But after 1 minute it goes impossibly fast and there is no way you can go on. The game has changed since I got it, and not in a good way. The game definitely robs you of your day.

I love this game don't get me wrong. But there is one HUGE problem. TOO MANY DAMN ADS. Literally after EVERY run it gives me the choice of watching an ad or buying a no ads version. I don't mind watching ads to get a bonus or after every few runs. But after EVERY run is incredibly frustrating and I'm tempted to just stop playing in all honesty. Edit: Changing to 2 stars and uninstalling. What a greedy game.

Wow I'm blown away! I downloaded this app, play from time to time, had made in game purchases which included SEVERAL costumes, power up, jetpacks, etc. I just logged in to play and poof EVERYTHING I PURCHASED WAS GONE! I'm uninstalling because I don't appreciate being ripped off! I spent real money for enough coins to purchase all of that stuff just to have it ripped away?! I'm furious! Don't waste your time with these thieves. You'll have it one day and the next they'll take it!

The actual game play is super fun and I've played this game off and on for probably 10 years at this point. The problem is the amount of advertisement and the length of them. Sometimes I'll play a round and then have to sit through a whole 90 second ad. I'm not paying to remove them so it makes the game miserable I had to delete it after a few rounds because the ads are so annoying.
This used to be one of the best games to play, but now its full of annoying ads, some of which forces you to close the game to get past, and heavily focuses on microtransactions.
good game, hard to play on tablets. resolution too big, makes object avoidance difficult.
I'm glad I grabbed the Ecto-1 when I could because she's awesome but please half-brick either make the Cryo-Thrusters good or remove them from the game already please

an absurd amount of predatory ads and expensive microtransactions. also, almost every ad has the close button hidden behind the built in UI. very frustrating, especially after you watch 90 seconds of ads only to have to close the game and lose whatever you were watching the ad for. Edit: The ad for the S.A.M. when you die glitched out and asked me to retry so I did, and it reset the whole run and I lost everything including a double coin run. 30,000 chucked out the window. 2 stars now

Since the update I have noticed the game doesn't recognise you completing missions. For example, In my last run I was supposed to run 1,500m on the floor, yet the number remained 0 for the whole game. I mean, that's impossible... I've also noticed it with missions you have to complete such as high-five scientists and rub your head against the roof. Please fix!

I last reviewed this game in 2016 when it was consistently adding new content and was super fun to play. Now they've added forced ads to the game and have nowhere near the same amount of new content. Basically if you play this game now you will be constantly interrupted with ads. The legendary Jetpack Joyride is now an ad farm game. I'm not going to give you any more money for a game with no new content. And I'm not going to suffer through forced ads. Goodbye Jetpack Joyride.

Game is spoiled from what it used to be, I reinstalled hoping for some fun. But everything is a barrage of "buy this" or some advertisement. Making it feel like it is imitating those bland 'free to pay to play' style games. I bought things before in game and they aren't there, and that would be been okay, I would have bought them again, but the whole interface is trying to get my money. So no, the quality is there... But the desperation is saddening. I hope I can find an old version of the apk somewhere and just play in peace.

I want to advise you no to download this game if your coming back for nostalgia reasons, you'll be disappointed. the game play is not even the same anymore, I haven't played in years(and I wont play again, because I know they won't fix anything) I am disappointed to see how its gone downhill, the ads are too long and come up too often. then they force purchases on you, and its really not cheap for cosmetics.

Game is nowhere as good as it used to be. There are way too many in app purchases and there is an ad after every run. It is not as fluid as it used to be. Game classics are still there, and it is still fun. Just too many ads
What used to be a fun free game has become an over-monetized, dull mess.

star_3.text: I love the game itself, it's fun! But the one reason why it doesn't get my five stars is because I'm starting to wonder what this game has turned into. It used to just be a fun game where you can fly and and can buy new jetpacks and stuff. But now, it's littered with ads, so many in app purchases that it's hard to count, and some of the events are boring, very lazy, and just generally kind of dumb. Please fix this, it would make your game alot better. Stop hiding vital mechanics behind paywalls!

Long time player; since it's first days as a game, I've played it. I recall nearly no ads being a problem, but since I've reinstalled it, the ads on Jetpack Joyride is quite awful. An ad initiates every time you die. And when it's already frustrating, the ads play sound right over the music you're listening to. Made me uninstall the game after 4 or 5 times. You'd get more money if you would decrease the amount of ads. Your player base won't have it.

Man... what a game. But... its ad ridden now. 3rd slot which I can almost guarantee was free. Is now a 5$ buy on. I remember when this game only had buyable currency and that's it. Now it's pay for no ads, pay for utility slot, etc... why can't we go back to when it wasn't filled with ads and was just a fun endless runner? Nothing new has been added in the time

🔥The games is REALLY good and is such a classic mobile game!🔥 However, I am experiencing a bug in the game that makes the game freeze randomly. This is really annoying when I am getting a good score and it just freezes. I noticed that it usually happens when I get a machine block in a run, then it freezes. Maybe that's something🤔 Please fix this and it will be 5 stars👍

Ad-zilla. I remember when this game wasn't riddled with pop-up adds. Sure, it had ads, but not ones that interrupted gameplay to a non skipable ad. It's infuriating and disruptive to the gameplay. I get it, they have to make money off the game, but the game hasn't changed since it's release. Nothing new to rave about to start adding pop-up ads.

Honestly, I have been playing this game for many many years, and used to absolutely love it. Recently, it has gone down hill. Since getting more popular, the adds have gotten a bit rediculous, and also more and more missions are starting to glitch. Ex: One mission will be "Fly over 18 zappers in one game", and it won't register or be marked as complete for 2-3 games, regardless to how many you fly over (plus many other issues with other missions).

Used to be great but now it's monetized in every single direction. You can't go one run without having to watch one long ad that even has ad overlays when you are trying to close it. It really breaks you from the flow of the game. Watch an ad for this, watch an ad for that. It's too much and I'm over it

The ads though.... seriously, don't offer a prize for an add with the chance to ignore it if you're just going to force an add on me anyway. Don't be greedy with them, if we was g to s5 them for a prize, then ok, but jesus christ. I ignore ads as mitch as possible so they don't keep pausing my audio books. If you auto play ads in mute mode that'd be ok, just sp forcing them down my throat while I'm trying to listen to my books. Otherwise the games decent and somewhat fun.

Jetpack Joyride is a very enjoyable game, but when it comes to ads, they basically ruin it. After almost every time I die a question pops on my screen asking if I love ads or if I want to get rid of them. The problem is, there is no way to get the question off of your screen. If you are like me and don't like to spend money on a no ads deal, you are forced to click the "I love ads" button. After clicking it, it forces you to watch an add.

A very somber farewell to this game. I had played this game for 8 years off and on, but never uninstalled. I was proud of my maxed out collection, and though support for the game wasn't really there for a long stretch I knew I could always come back and mess around, having a good time. However I decided I would play again today, and whenever I do I'm greeted by the fact that my progress has been erased, despite google play still having my level number in the notification. Unfortunate uninstall.

love the game the only problem I'm seeing right now is for some reason it gets stuck on the ads like how there's usually an x for you to x out of the ADD but for some reason it doesn't appear and then you can't get back into the game unless you reset the game so that's really the only problem I'm seeing right now which should be what I believe in easy fix

This is a fun game but it is incredibly hard to get the near miss zappers missions only about 1 out of 10 zappers will near miss for me and it is very frustrating. Pretty much what I have resorted to is getting the near miss with a vehicle cuase that still works. Also I wish you could upgrade the magnet gadget so I could collect more coins.
i thought the challenges would earn extra envelopes, not extra coins. I have 14M coins. I do not need anymore
too repetitive. can only be played with ad blocker otherwise you will watch ads non stop

The game is great. Ads are bearable I guess and if you don't think care about the IAP it's fun. The main issue however is the backup. You see when you mostly play offline and play with WiFi at some point (while booting up the game) the game will revert your progress back to when you had WiFi on. This is really, and I mean really bad because not only will people lose hours of progress but will also discourage playing offline or online. If they changed this however I'm definitely giving it 5 stars

Edited: Purchasing gets rid of 3rd party ads. In game offers & encouragement to spend still appear. I love the design of this game but the offers and encouragement to view ads and spend really detracts. I don't want an option to view an ad at the start & end of every run. Good game, slightly spoiled. Edit: Pop up ads still occur after purchase, that say they'll disappear after purchase. :/ An option to turn off further offers for those who've purchased would be great.

It's so simple, yet so much fun! If a game has a high learning curve then it takes a while before you can start having fun but with this game you can pretty much just jump right in and have a blast! Every time you watch an ad you have to pray the game doesn't crash. Please implement a system to mitigate this, I've missed out on so many event tokens/coins at the end of a run because of this. I am not even sure if the initial amount gets added when it crashes.

The game is so close to perfection. The in-app purchases ruins it. Why not give the option to unlock it for a lot of in-game currency as well? You have these cool models with different mechanics that are quite costly. If you make it difficult to unlock but not impossible, then at least there is a chance to get them with enough time.

1. I cannot restore my purchases (I had one so I wanna get rid of ads again) — Net says, I need to go to "Stats" section and find it there. Nope. There is no button. 2. No progress restoration either. 3. Russian translation SUCKS! If I could, I wanna re-translate the game because that person who did that before definitely doesn't know Russian.

With the addition of reward advertisements, there becomes less of an insentive to play the game. "Given the opportunity, a player will optimize the fun out of a game". This quote I feel applies here as the quickest way to beat your highscore is to watch lots of advertisements. Giving it three stars as the gameplay without the adverts is still quite good, just a bit laggy on my Moto G5S Plus.

star_4.text: Always a great time as it used to be. Although, it does feel like its a bit ad heavy and overselling itself. Its cramoed with ads now and full of things you have to pay money to have. I could've sworn the third gadget slot used to be free, but maybe I just remember wrong. Either way, still memorable and fun, and the humor in the descriptions of most items are fantastic

My sister got me to play this game years ago and got it again to play with my kids. Lol. Passing on the fun. A silly, enjoyable game that is still fun play. Though, I have to say I don't recall all the adds. Excessive at times and takes away from an otherwise good game. Sucks that so many games seem to be intentionally annoying to get you to spend the money just to get rid of the adds. Sure, only a couple of dollars, but if they just minimized the adds, I might actually pay attention to them instead of getting frustrated and just counting the seconds to be able to skip them. Just saying.

Still a great game even after over a decade. My only complaint is how certain items are locked until you pay for them, such as the 3rd item slot and certain vehicles, but it doesn't detract from the gameplay at all and ads for in-app purchases are rare enough that they're not bothersome. Updates are constant and keep the game fresh, as well. Still a classic mobile game, and I'm excited to see what your team will release next!

It's a classic and wonderful game that I believe everyone, with access, should play, if they haven't already. Ads are always a given when it comes to free mobile games. Though, I dont like that fact that you have the choice to watch an ad to double your coins, or similar small boosts, and after refusing or skipping, it plays an ad reguardless. This is the only downside, in my opinion, otherwise great game.

As great a game as it always has been. I really don't get the reviews saying that this game is "shoving ads down your throat" considering that I played it for a good half hour on the bus out of boredom and didn't see a single ad, even with network connection. Sure, the game has microtransactions, but that hardly a greedy game makes. Overall great game, would recommend.

It is a great game and I do understand that ads help fund the game to make it free for users. With that said, it is frustrating that after every run an ad plays. When you're in the zone and want to focus on the challenges, you get distracted. An ad after 3 runs wouldn't be so bad. Or the option of getting items after watching the ad. There is already the option in game where you can watch an ad and receive an item. I believe there is an option where you buy in game currency and ads disappear.

I really enjoyed this game and have been playing for years, however I wish this game had a larger "wing" jetpack selection. This game also forces you to complete the entire tutorial, instead of giving you the choice to sign in, whenever you open the game on another device. I find this annoying, because whenever I try to download this on a separate device, it forces me to first complete the tutorial first.

This game is very addictive. However, i still needs a little polishing (despite it having been around for so long). The tokens will sometimes end up inside the zappers, making them impossible to get without dying. Also, this may just be my phone, bit the game usually freezes shortly every 5 seconds.

I remember when it was all free to play with the only microtransactions being coins and the only adswhere on the home screen. Now you have to pay $5 for the third gagget slot when it used to be free to my knowledge and there's ads all over the game (though you can choose to ignore them if you want to miss out on "free" boosts) It is still fun though and a great time killer, just sad to see them go this route

I've been playing this game for a while now, and back in like 2016? It was a super fun easy game for all ages, I dropped it for a while and got it back in 1018 no changes still super fun, dropped it again and by the time I found it again it was 2020, changed, its not much different but i find it a coincidence that when the update happened, only then was there slight lags, I have no problem with the game the lags are just a bit annoying.

I've been enjoying this game since elementary school. It's an amazing game! I'll continue to play it! I love the graphics, music, and I overall just the whole concept of the game. There are a few annoying things though. First of all, the ads. I get that you guys need money, and it isn't a big issue, but they are a bit intrusive. I did purchase Mr borgles to get rid of the ads though. Another issue is the general cash grabby-ness. Other than that, it's an amazing game! Would definitely recommend!

Sure there are a lot of microtransactions, but you don't need any of them. The third item slot being behind a paywall is a bit of a let down though, that's why 4 stars. This brings back a lot of happy and fun childhood memories, and it's still fun to play and try to get all the items in the collabs I like, especially this He Man collab. I hope that at some point the developers will add a way to get the third item slot in game rather than through wallet's.

I wouldn't be so upset about the ads, if it weren't for the fact I had already spent money on this app in the past. By buying an item, you no longer view ads. I bought the Back to the future pack back in 2015 and it now does not remember that purchase. The items are present, but I still get ads after every other game or so. A bit frustrating. Love it otherwise.

I give this 4 stars for a few reasons. First, there are a lot of ads, but I understand that. Not many people purchase the packs, so they'vs gotta get the money elsewhere. Second, the game gets pretty laggy at the start of a run, but that has died down of recent. Third, even if you complete the tutorial for Magic Brick Wars, you still cannot recieve the special skin. That really isn't a huge deal. Other than that, the game is pretty fun. Very addicting!

This game is simple and fun and I have enjoyed it for a long time. It's a simple dodge game were you see how far you can get past certain obstacles and try to challenge yourself and friends. My biggest grip is how much trouble the game save backup system is it can be rather finicky. It seems to work fine some days and then say "cloud backup failed" the next. The constant addition of new content is great but, if we have to risk losing what we worked I can't give the game a full five stars. Hope that at some point in time they can get that resolved.

I like the game, I think it has a glitch though. It seemed to erase my progress. I signed in on Google play, that was an easy fix. But then I went into the gadgets menu, and I couldn't access the gadgets I'd bought. It was like the time before I'd bought them when the higher levels are dark and you can't tap on them, but it still showed that I own them. I bought some more from level 1 which I hadn't bought yet, hoping it would unlock the next level, and it didn't. Otherwise, no trouble.

I've been playing this game on and off for 8 years, and it's always fun to come back to. The addition of the power ups, and watching ads for more.gold or to skip missions is very welcome. Onky issue is when doing a cover a distance on foot mission comes up, it won't register the first time, and you have to play again to get it to count
This new event is great and all, but some of these new jetpacks are causing massive loss of framerate.
this game is very enjoyable, except my little brother rages and throws my phone. other then that. good game. also don't like the ads.

Just recently got back into this game and I have one problem, the reward system is ridiculous in the Masters of The Universe event, it goes from 100 to 750, THAT IS UNREASONABLY HIGH OF A SCORE, ESPECIALLY WHEN THOSE LITTLE H'S ARE HARD TO GRAB THROUGH ALL THE HAZARDS, but I will lighten up due to the theme of the event which is very nicely done, all I'm saying is find a way to lower the points to much more fair area, start small and gradually increase it, dont go and make it 1k after 2 rewards

star_5.text: Other than the ads the game is great of course, I paid for no ads so it wouldn't pop up ads after playing a round or claiming rewards occasionally. If you don't mind ads after playing rounds in other games this won't bother you. The game is a classic endless runner, tap to ascend with the mini-gun jetpack like the old days and go as far as you can! I like the power-ups you can collect to give breathing room as well, great game flow. The grind for coins to get stylish stuff in the shop is fun.

An awesome experience that I have had since Halo Combat Evolved, and that is not even a mobile game. I love the fact that you guys added multiple stuff to buy so that grinding never really gets boring. If there is one thing that i would add, it would be storylines. Have little chapters so that we get to know this barry character. I love this game, and i wish that you could expand outwards more instead of just running through the endless lab. Hey, that is just me. You don't have to do it.

I like the game a lot, but I have an AWESOME idea for you guys: for the third slot to have an extra gadget, once you buy every single thing and upgrade all of the power-ups in the game, it will cost instead of $4.99 to either $2.99 or for free, depending on how many badges you have at the time of when you unlock everything. This will also be a little secret, so nobody will know unless they look at the the third gadget icon and figure out that there's a discount there. Please reply back to me after reading this review and I hope you like my idea!

This game has the cherry tip of nostalgia for me, playing it on my sister's old tablet when we were real young, and it still holds up. However, there are a ton of advertisements, so much so that it can be challenging to navigate menus through the game. The game also is incredibly challenging to get far in, gaining immense speed quickly, but I suppose that's just how it's always been. Not a critique exactly, but just an observation. Otherwise, I still really enjoy this game, long after those days

Timeless game. The gameplay is enjoyable, there are personal goals you can set such as reaching a level, unlocking certain jetpacks/costumes, or getting higher scores. These keep the game addictive and give a feeling of progress. Although the game doesn't really have any new "content" added to it outside of cosmetic stuff, I do think it's well maintained. My only complaint is that my coin doubler that I purchased years ago isn't active anymore and I can't seem to get it back.

I have never personally played the game, but my girlfriend plays it almost compulsively. I am basing this review on the Amazing Customer Service provided by the company. My girlfriend had been playing for months on a guest account on accident, without noticing, and she accidentally pressed Uninstall instead of Update when she was trying to update the game. All progress she'd made was lost, and that could have easily been the end of it, but customer support went above and beyond to help.

For a game with one touch controls, its still such a blast to play. The costumes, the jetpacks, everything. Its just too good. The part that really stands out to this game are the vehicles. The veichles are so fun to use. Want a robot that crushes everything? Want a bird that pops money? Want a teleporter? This game is for you! The devs should make major updates to this game adding new things then making events. But it's still good the way it is :)

It's just so good. The sound track, style, and general feel of the game is what has made this game S Tier, and a favorite of my childhood and today. The simplistic "run throughout an infinite science facility" never gets old, plus the ability to use power ups to give you a boost along. I said it once, and I will say it again. S Tier.

As good a time as ever to review this game...to start off it's just a classic runner, my personal favorite. The gameplay and mechanic work well, it's fun and infinitely replayable. The variety of costumes/jetpacks are a joy to behold, the vehicles are fun to use and diverse. The different events are always great to see and along with S.A.M they give you a reason to always come back for more. I've been playing for this for years now and I definitely could play it for years to come.

This game now works and I still have all my old purchases! Very happy to be able to play this game again. A few of my favorite things: the missions, the gadgets, and the amount of character and machine customization. I think the biggest area of improvement would be to get the events to consistently work - right now the Back to the Future event is a little wonky, with disappearing character/vehicles.

Good game! Really fun for passing the time. As for ads, well, they're almost always skippable after 5 secs, and I'd rather support the creator so they're more willing to keep the game going. Dear people complaining about ads, do you not understand the purpose of them? If you don't want to see them, you can always purchase no-ad items.

This game was such a large part of when I was sable to play on a tablet or smartphone during my childhood. Enough being nostalgic though. I try many apps out and don't usually leave reviews. But I encountered a bug in the Back to the Future event. I contacted the support team and they got back to me in just a few hours, and the bug was fixed very swiftly. I wanted to write this review as a thank you I guess, as now I can play the game without the bug.

I had so much fun playing this game. I honestly love this game, and I'm not rly a person who minds ads too much. But the problem is that last time I played, I was on a roll and I bought lots of things with the coins I absolutely grinded for. Then when I came back to play, I came back to see I was back to a certain point, before I bought those items and leveled up a LOT. I uninstalled the app because I just didn't feel like going through all that progress again.

Only critizisms is that the turbo boost gadget interfers the effects of the coin dash and rocket time powerups. For coin dash, the boost can sometimes boost me too far ahead of the coins, missing a huge chunk of them. For rocket time, the boost gets rid of the rockets and vehicles. If the boost gadget were to be changed to fly off when picking up a powerup, similarly to how it does when you get a vehicle, that would be a lot better. Other than that, the game's just as good as it was in 2011!

Best game I've ever played on phone. Ive been a long-term player for this game ever since it came out. Its great to pass the time. Purchasing the cheap double coins add-on makes it much more convenient and quicker to buy skins, jetpacks, and upgrades; a great investment! And with all the updates the game comes out with from spooky Halloween to jolly Christmas themes, its endless fun and entertainment. I recommend everyone to try this game and see for yourselves!

Jetpack Joyride is the best mobile game I have played in a while. It is so addictive and fun and I could not put it down after I started playing. I love the costumes and the jetpacks themselves. Me personally, I love the flying V guitar jetpack and the baby outfit with the clown head. I love how funny the game can be as well. For example, the challenges. I love how some of the challenges can be goofy like high fiving the scientists. I also love the upgrades you can get, like the dog. Great game.

I've been playing this since my elementary school days and I can say for sure that it's one of the best mobile games of all time. It has lots of features, cosmetics are actually worth getting, gadgets are fun to use, and the events keep the game interesting. Regular gameplay is kept fresh with cosmetics and gadgets and the game is playable offline.

Great game, very addictive. I have been playing for years and love wasting time on it. If I could suggest an improvement however, it would be a vehicle shield that could be upgraded maybe as a future power-up. I feel that this could help players achieve longer runs in the vehicles and make an already fun game even more fun. Thank you for your time and once again, great game.

I got my new phone a while back and just had to have this game on it because I always had fun playing it. But then I deleted it for space but I had to reinstall it but I wasn't able to retrieve my progress from my other device. I had the old profile for a long time and had really cool stuff so i kept trying but couldn't get my old account.😞 Cool game though

Fantastic amount of content, and intensely fun. I could play for hours on end! The recent updates seem to have solved a lot of the stability issues I had with previous versions. That, and the recent addition of ability to save/synchronize progress/achievements across devices mean Barry Steakfries deserves a full 5 stars. Kudos, Halfbrick!
